-- Migration: 0001_initial_schema
-- Created: 2026-05-15
-- Description: Initial database schema for AUDIRA Cloud Device Orchestrator

-- Enums
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE device_status AS ENUM ('online', 'offline', 'idle', 'busy', 'error', 'maintenance', 'updating', 'provisioning', 'decommissioned'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE device_type AS ENUM ('android', 'linux', 'windows', 'macos', 'iot', 'raspberry_pi', 'browser_worker', 'docker_agent', 'vm_agent', 'kubernetes_node'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE alert_severity AS ENUM ('info', 'warning', 'error', 'critical'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE alert_status AS ENUM ('active', 'acknowledged', 'resolved'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE job_status AS ENUM ('pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE user_role AS ENUM ('super_admin', 'tenant_owner', 'admin', 'operator', 'viewer'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE user_status AS ENUM ('active', 'inactive', 'suspended'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE tenant_plan AS ENUM ('free', 'pro', 'enterprise'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;
DO $$ BEGIN CREATE TYPE tenant_status AS ENUM ('active', 'suspended', 'trial', 'cancelled'); EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN null; END $$;

-- Tables
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenants (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  domain VARCHAR(255),
  plan tenant_plan NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  status tenant_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  max_devices INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  max_users INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  username VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  display_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  role user_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'viewer',
  status user_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  avatar VARCHAR(500),
  last_login TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS devices (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type device_type NOT NULL,
  status device_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'offline',
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  mac_address VARCHAR(17),
  os_version VARCHAR(100),
  agent_version VARCHAR(50),
  location JSONB,
  specs JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  tags JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  last_seen TIMESTAMP,
  last_heartbeat TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_groups (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  color VARCHAR(7),
  parent_id UUID,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS device_group_members (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  group_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES device_groups(id),
  device_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES devices(id),
  added_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS alerts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  device_id UUID REFERENCES devices(id),
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  severity alert_severity NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  status alert_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  source VARCHAR(100),
  acknowledged_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  acknowledged_at TIMESTAMP,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS jobs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status job_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  target_devices JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  payload JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  result JSONB,
  progress INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  started_at TIMESTAMP,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP,
  scheduled_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_by UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telemetry (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  device_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES devices(id),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  cpu_usage REAL,
  memory_usage REAL,
  disk_usage REAL,
  network_in REAL,
  network_out REAL,
  temperature REAL,
  battery_level REAL,
  uptime INTEGER,
  process_count INTEGER,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  user_id UUID REFERENCES users(id),
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  resource VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  resource_id VARCHAR(255),
  details JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent VARCHAR(500),
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS roles (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  permissions JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  is_system BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS settings (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES tenants(id),
  key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  value TEXT NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Migrations tracking table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _migrations (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  applied_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_tenant ON devices(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_devices_status ON devices(status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_tenant ON alerts(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_status ON alerts(status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_device ON alerts(device_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_alerts_created ON alerts(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_telemetry_device ON telemetry(device_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_telemetry_tenant ON telemetry(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_telemetry_timestamp ON telemetry(timestamp);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_telemetry_device_time ON telemetry(device_id, timestamp DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_logs_tenant ON audit_logs(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_audit_logs_created ON audit_logs(created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_jobs_tenant ON jobs(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_jobs_status ON jobs(status);

-- Record migration
INSERT INTO _migrations (name) VALUES ('0001_initial_schema') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

---

## ✅ Fase 3 — Operations — Selesai

### Yang Diimplementasikan:

| # | Feature | File | Detail |
|---|---------|------|--------|
| 1 | **Dockerfile** | `services/api-gateway/Dockerfile` | Multi-stage build, non-root user, healthcheck, production-optimized |
| 2 | **docker-compose.prod.yml** | Root | Full stack: PostgreSQL + Redis + API Gateway, env vars, resource limits, health checks |
| 3 | **Versioned Migrations** | `drizzle/0001_initial_schema.sql` + `migrate.mjs` | SQL migration files, tracking table `_migrations`, idempotent runner |
| 4 | **Prometheus Metrics** | `src/lib/metrics.ts` | `/metrics` endpoint: HTTP requests, latency percentiles, WS connections, orchestrator stats, memory, DB pool |
| 5 | **Turbo.json** | Root | Workspace task orchestration for parallel builds |
| 6 | **Environment Config** | `.env` | Development defaults, documented |
| 7 | **.dockerignore** | `services/api-gateway/` | Exclude node_modules, dist, logs |

### Deployment Commands:

```bash
# Development (local)
docker compose up -d                    # Start DB + Redis
cd services/api-gateway
node migrate.mjs                        # Run migrations
node seed-db.mjs                        # Seed data
pnpm dev                                # Start with hot-reload

# Production (Docker)
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build

# Monitoring
curl http://localhost:3388/metrics       # Prometheus scrape
curl http://localhost:3388/api/v1/health # Health check
```

### Metrics yang Di-expose (`/metrics`):

```
process_uptime_seconds
process_memory_rss_bytes
http_requests_total{method,status}
http_request_duration_ms{method,quantile="0.5|0.95|0.99"}
http_errors_total
ws_connections_total / dashboard / agents
orchestrator_devices_connected
orchestrator_commands_dispatched_total
orchestrator_commands_completed_total
orchestrator_commands_failed_total
orchestrator_heartbeats_total
orchestrator_alerts_generated_total
orchestrator_jobs_executed_total
dependency_redis_connected
dependency_db_pool_total / idle / waiting
```

### Ringkasan 3 Fase Lengkap:

| Fase | Focus | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| **Fase 1** | Security & Stability | ✅ Redis, Rate Limit, RBAC, Validation, WS Auth, Security Headers |
| **Fase 2** | Scalability | ✅ Redis persistence, Batch APIs, Telemetry buffer, Retention, Concurrency control |
| **Fase 3** | Operations | ✅ Dockerfile, docker-compose.prod, Migrations, Metrics, Turbo config |

}

  'Show me offline devices',
  'Give me recommendations',
  'Detect anomalies',
  'Predict future issues',
  'Show alert summary',

];

export function AIAssistantPage() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([
    {
      id: '0',
      role: 'assistant',
      content: '👋 Hello! I\'m your AI Infrastructure Assistant. I can help you monitor, analyze, and optimize your device fleet.\n\nTry asking me:\n• "Show system overview"\n• "Which devices have high CPU?"\n• "Give me recommendations"\n• "Detect anomalies"\n• "Predict future issues"',
      suggestions: quickQueries.slice(0, 4),
      timestamp: new Date(),
    },

---

## ✅ Multi-Provider AI Orchestration — Selesai

### Arsitektur AI Gateway:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    AI PROVIDERS PAGE (UI)                     │
│  ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────┐          │
│  │ OpenAI  │ │Anthropic│ │  Groq   │ │DeepSeek │ ...27     │
│  │ ✅ 45ms │ │ ⬜      │ │ ⬜      │ │ ⬜      │           │
│  └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘ └─────────┘          │
└──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘
                           │
┌──────────────────────────▼──────────────────────────────────┐
│                   AI GATEWAY (Backend)                        │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │           AI PROVIDER MANAGER                        │    │
│  │  • 27 provider adapters (OpenAI-compat, Anthropic,  │    │
│  │    Gemini, Ollama)                                   │    │
│  │  • Connection testing & health check                 │    │
│  │  • Auto-fallback (provider down → next)              │    │
│  │  • Usage tracking (tokens, requests per provider)    │    │
│  │  • Credential storage (Redis-backed)                 │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │           UNIFIED COMPLETION API                     │    │
│  │  POST /ai/complete → route to provider               │    │
│  │  POST /ai/query → fleet context + AI response        │    │
│  │  Fallback: rule-based if no provider connected       │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 27 Providers Supported:

| Category | Providers |
|----------|-----------|
| **OAuth** (5) | Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, Cursor IDE, Cline |
| **Free Tier** (6) | Qwen Code, Gemini CLI, OpenRouter, NVIDIA NIM, Ollama (Local), Cloudflare AI |
| **API Key** (16) | OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, Cohere, Fireworks, Together AI, Perplexity, Cerebras, SambaNova, HuggingFace, Replicate, Vertex AI |

### API Endpoints:

```
GET  /ai/providers              — List all 27 providers with status
POST /ai/providers/:id/connect  — Connect with API key
POST /ai/providers/:id/disconnect — Disconnect
POST /ai/providers/:id/test     — Test connection (returns latency)
GET  /ai/providers/usage        — Token & request usage per provider
POST /ai/complete               — Send completion to any provider
POST /ai/query                  — Smart query (fleet context + AI)
```

### Cara Pakai:

```bash
# Connect OpenAI
curl -X POST /ai/providers/openai/connect \
  -d '{"apiKey": "sk-..."}'

# Connect Groq (ultra fast, free tier)
curl -X POST /ai/providers/groq/connect \
  -d '{"apiKey": "gsk_..."}'

# Connect Ollama (local, no key needed)
curl -X POST /ai/providers/ollama/connect \
  -d '{"apiKey": "not-needed"}'

# Query with auto-routing to connected provider
curl -X POST /ai/query \
  -d '{"query": "Which devices have high CPU?"}'

# Direct completion to specific provider
curl -X POST /ai/complete \
  -d '{"provider": "groq", "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", "messages": [...]}'
```

Frontend UI (`/ai-insights`) menampilkan semua provider dalam grid cards seperti screenshot yang kamu tunjukkan — dengan tombol Connect, Test, dan status indicator.
